strengths: Excellent route implementation (95%) - 32+ API routes well-organized
Advanced features (NLP, RAG, AI assistant, analytics)
weaknesses: No circuit breaker for external services

improvementTasks.title: Implement Custom Error Classes Hierarchy
improvementTasks.description: Create a comprehensive error class hierarchy for consistent error handling across the application
testCriteria: Error classes properly extend base error
Error codes are unique and descriptive

improvementTasks.title: Implement Global Error Handler Middleware
improvementTasks.description: Create a global error handler that catches all errors and formats responses consistently
testCriteria: All error types are handled correctly
Sensitive information is not exposed in production

improvementTasks.title: Create Request Validation Middleware with Zod
improvementTasks.description: Implement a reusable validation middleware using Zod schemas for all routes
testCriteria: Invalid requests are rejected with clear error messages
Type safety is maintained with TypeScript

improvementTasks.title: Implement Circuit Breaker for External Services
improvementTasks.description: Add circuit breaker pattern for OpenAI, Redis, and other external services to handle failures gracefully
testCriteria: Metrics are recorded for circuit state changes

improvementTasks.title: Implement Comprehensive API Versioning Strategy
improvementTasks.description: Improve API versioning with support for v2 routes and deprecation warnings
testCriteria: Version detection works from path and headers
v2 routes can coexist with v1
Breaking changes are isolated to new versions

improvementTasks.title: Re-enable Disabled Routes
improvementTasks.description: Fix dependencies and re-enable documents-enhanced and legal-documents-enhanced routes

steps.verification: No import errors on server start

steps.details: Ensure routes use new validation middleware and error handling

steps.code:
await app.register(documentRoutesEnhanced, { prefix: '/api/v1' });
await app.register(legalDocumentRoutesEnhanced, { prefix: '/api/v1' });

improvementTasks.title: Implement Request/Response Logging Middleware
improvementTasks.description: Add comprehensive logging middleware for debugging and auditing
testCriteria: All requests are logged with unique IDs
Logs are structured for easy parsing

improvementTasks.title: Implement Input Sanitization Middleware
improvementTasks.description: Add middleware to sanitize inputs and prevent injection attacks
testCriteria: Valid HTML tags are preserved when needed

improvementTasks.title: Implement Comprehensive Error Handling Tests
improvementTasks.description: Create test suite for error handling scenarios
testCriteria: All error types have test coverage

improvementTasks.title: Update API Documentation with Error Codes
improvementTasks.description: Document all error codes and response formats

implementation.content:
Create comprehensive documentation including:
- All error codes and their meanings
- Example error responses for each code
- Troubleshooting guide for common errors
- Best practices for error handling in client applications

errorHandlingExample.description: Example of using custom errors in a route

circuitBreakerExample.description: Example of using circuit breaker with OpenAI

validationExample.description: Complete validation example with custom schemas

phase1.name: Foundation - Error Handling & Validation
goals: Update core routes with new patterns

phase2.name: Resilience & Security
goals: Add circuit breakers for external services

phase4.name: Testing & Documentation
goals: Achieve 80%+ test coverage for error handling

technicalRisks.risk: Breaking changes in error response format
technicalRisks.mitigation: Implement gradually with API versioning, maintain backward compatibility in v1
Benchmark before/after, optimize Zod schemas, use caching where appropriate
Fine-tune thresholds based on monitoring, implement gradual rollout

implementationRisks.risk: Incomplete migration to new error handling
implementationRisks.mitigation: Use TypeScript strict mode, comprehensive testing, gradual rollout
Comprehensive test suite, security audit, user feedback

successCriteria: All API routes return consistent error formats
Circuit breakers active for all external services (OpenAI, Redis, PostgreSQL)
API versioning supports v1 and v2 simultaneously
All disabled routes are re-enabled and functional

monitoring: Error rate metrics by type and endpoint
optimization: Review circuit breaker thresholds after 1 week
Optimize validation schemas based on performance data
Refine error messages based on user feedback
Update documentation based on support tickets
